name: Signet Vault
description: Encrypted local data store with key management. Implements BIP39 mnemonic generation and recovery, SLIP-0010 Ed25519 master key derivation, and a HKDF-based key hierarchy. It features a three-tier data model and an append-only hash-chained audit log.

types.name: Tier
types.description: Data tiers defining access and sensitivity levels.

types.name: AuditLogEntry

fields.name: timestamp
fields.description: Unix timestamp of the audit log entry.

fields.name: previous_hash
fields.description: Hash of the previous log entry.

fields.name: current_hash
fields.description: Hash of the current log entry.

types.description: Struct representing an entry in the audit log.

types.name: Mnemonic

fields.name: phrase
fields.description: List of words constituting the mnemonic.

types.description: Struct representing a BIP39 mnemonic phrase.

types.name: SignetVaultError
types.description: Enumeration of possible errors within the Signet Vault.

functions.name: generate_mnemonic
functions.description: Generates a new BIP39 mnemonic phrase.

error_cases.name: MnemonicGenerationFailed
error_cases.condition: If the mnemonic generation process fails.

postconditions: A valid BIP39 mnemonic is generated.

functions.name: derive_key
functions.description: Derives a new key from the given mnemonic.

inputs.name: mnemonic
inputs.description: The BIP39 mnemonic to derive the key from.

inputs.name: key_type
inputs.description: The type of key to derive.

error_cases.name: KeyDerivationFailed
error_cases.condition: If the key derivation process fails.

preconditions: Input mnemonic must be a valid BIP39 mnemonic.
postconditions: A newly derived key is returned based on the key type.

functions.name: store_data
functions.description: Stores the given data in a specified tier in encrypted form.

inputs.name: data
inputs.description: The data to be encrypted and stored.

inputs.name: tier
inputs.description: The tier in which the data should be stored.

error_cases.name: EncryptionFailed
error_cases.condition: If encryption of the data fails.

error_cases.name: StorageError
error_cases.condition: If there is an issue storing the encrypted data.

postconditions: Data is encrypted and securely stored in the specified tier.

functions.name: retrieve_data
functions.description: Retrieves and decrypts data from a specified tier.

inputs.name: identifier
inputs.description: The identifier for the data to retrieve.

inputs.name: tier
inputs.description: The tier from which to retrieve the data.

error_cases.name: DecryptionFailed
error_cases.condition: If decryption of the data fails.

error_cases.name: StorageError
error_cases.condition: If the data cannot be found or there is an issue accessing storage.

preconditions: Identifier must correspond to existing stored data.
postconditions: The data is successfully decrypted and returned.

functions.name: log_action
functions.description: Logs an action into the audit log.

inputs.name: entry
inputs.description: The entry to add to the audit log.

postconditions: Action is recorded in the audit log.

invariants: Vault server never has access to plaintext
Tier 3 compartment keys are never held by the agent
All disclosures are on the audit chain
No algorithm negotiation in any protocol
Zero secrets in memory after use
